시편 30:1.content: I will extol you, Yahweh, for you have raised me up, and have not made my foes to rejoice over me.

시편 30:2.content: Yahweh my God, I cried to you, and you have healed me.

시편 30:3.content: Yahweh, you have brought up my soul from Sheol. You have kept me alive, that I should not go down to the pit.

시편 30:4.content: Sing praise to Yahweh, you saints of his. Give thanks to his holy name.

시편 30:5.content: For his anger is but for a moment. His favor is for a lifetime. Weeping may stay for the night, but joy comes in the morning.

시편 30:6.content: As for me, I said in my prosperity, “I shall never be moved.”

시편 30:7.content: You, Yahweh, when you favored me, made my mountain stand strong; but when you hid your face, I was troubled.

시편 30:8.content: I cried to you, Yahweh. I made supplication to the Lord:

시편 30:9.content: “What profit is there in my destruction, if I go down to the pit? Shall the dust praise you? Shall it declare your truth?

시편 30:10.content: Hear, Yahweh, and have mercy on me. Yahweh, be my helper.”

시편 30:11.content: You have turned my mourning into dancing for me. You have removed my sackcloth, and clothed me with gladness,

시편 30:12.content: to the end that my heart may sing praise to you, and not be silent. Yahweh my God, I will give thanks to you forever!
